reviews.review_description:
When my friend introduced me to this game it was so much fun. It’s like gorilla tag but really fun and unique.  I also really like this game because you can hang around and has things gorilla tag doesn’t have, such as horror or zero gravity.  Derp shows one thing, it’s not the graphics that matter, it’s the experience and vibe.


-Slothvr

developer_response.body: Thank you for that nice review, even though IK the graphics aren't the best the shadows have been changed in the next update, just so they look better, but I will never make my games look super realistic because I like the style.

reviews.review_description: im co owner that why game very gooud.
The game pops out but a few bugs and glitches still happen but the game is perfect it even fits the name to a big game to explore

developer_response.body: We have fixed the bug with the rooms. but we are aware of some bugs that we will fix in the future.

reviews.review_description: Horror mode is sooo good, can’t wait for it to finish!

reviews.review_title: THE BEST GAME EVER (not bias bc I’m mod)
reviews.review_description: THE BEST GAME EVER 5 STARS HORROR IS SO GOOD AND IM SO SIGMA

reviews.review_title: This is the best fan game
reviews.review_description: I Play this game very often and it has updates 24/7

I just don’t know what do say about this game, it’s just really cool and good to cure your boredom. It’s also just great how many derpy coins and how many frequent updates it gets. I highly also recommend join the discord, it has a decent sized community with over 100 active players and a lot of really kind moderators. Not only can you submit fan-art, but they are also open so ideas to add. I also forget to mention the horror mode. Although It only has one level but it’s still really fun to play with your friends! I also cannot wait to see the upcoming PVP mode. a l s o p l e a s e j o i n t h e d i s c o r d: https://discord.com/channels/1207003463586811964/1207003463586811967
